Query: Heartbeat | summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer | where LastHeartbeat < ago(5m)
Event | where EventLog == System" and Source == "Service Control Manager" and RenderedDescription contains "stopped"" | where RenderedDescription contains ""critical"""
StorageBlobLogs | where StatusCode == 200 | summarize AvgLatency = avg(DurationMs) by AccountName | where AvgLatency > 1000
StorageBlobLogs | where StatusCode >= 400 | summarize ErrorCount = count() by AccountName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m) | where ErrorCount > 10
StorageBlobLogs | where StatusCode == 403 | summarize UnauthorizedCount = count() by AccountName, CallerIpAddress | where UnauthorizedCount > 5
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.SQL" and Category == "Deadlocks" | summarize DeadlockCount = count() by Resource"
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.SQL" and Category == "Errors" and error_number_d == 18456 | summarize FailedCount = count() by Resource | where FailedCount > 10"
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.SQL" and Category == "QueryStoreRuntimeStatistics" and duration_d > 30000 | summarize LongQueryCount = count() by Resource"
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.WEB" and Category == "AppServicePlatformLogs" and Message contains "restart" | summarize RestartCount = count() by Resource"
KubeNodeInventory | where Status != Ready" | summarize NotReadyCount = count() by ClusterName
KubePodInventory | where PodStatus == CrashLoopBackOff" | summarize CrashCount = count() by ClusterName

AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.NETWORK" and Category == "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog" and httpStatus_d >= 500 | summarize ErrorCount = count() by Resource | where ErrorCount > 10"
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.NETWORK" and Category == "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog" | summarize AvgLatency = avg(timeTaken_d) by Resource | where AvgLatency > 5000"
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.KEYVAULT" and ResultSignature == "Unauthorized" | summarize UnauthorizedCount = count() by Resource
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.KEYVAULT" and ResultSignature != "OK" | summarize FailedCount = count() by Resource
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.NETWORK" and Category == "LoadBalancerProbeHealthStatus" and State_s == "Down" | summarize UnhealthyCount = count() by Resource"
AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.EVENTHUB" and MetricName == ServerErrors" | summarize ErrorCount = sum(Total) by Resource | where ErrorCount > 5"
AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.SERVICEBUS" and MetricName == "DeadletteredMessages" | summarize DeadLetterCount = sum(Total) by Resource | where DeadLetterCount > 10"
AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.SERVICEBUS" and MetricName == "ServerErrors" | summarize ErrorCount = sum(Total) by Resource | where ErrorCount > 5"

AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.RECOVERYSERVICES" and Category == "AzureBackupReport" and OperationName == "Backup" and JobStatus_s == "Failed" | summarize FailureCount = count() by Resource"
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.RECOVERYSERVICES" and Category == "AzureBackupReport" | summarize LastBackup = max(TimeGenerated) by Resource
Severity: Backup not run in last 25 hours

Query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.AUTOMATION" and Category == "JobLogs" and ResultType == "Failed" | summarize FailureCount = count() by Resource
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.LOGIC" and Category == "WorkflowRuntime" and status_s == "Failed" | summarize FailureCount = count() by Resource | where FailureCount > 0"
AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == MICROSOFT.DATAFACTORY" and Category == "PipelineRuns" and Status == "Failed" | summarize FailureCount = count() by Resource
DatabricksClusterEvents | where EventType == TERMINATED" and Reason != "USER_REQUEST" | summarize TerminationCount = count() by WorkspaceName
